name: get_system_info
description: Retrieve TrueNAS system information (version, hostname, status).

name: list_vms
description: List all virtual machines and their current state.

name: list_pools
description: List ZFS storage pools, their health, and capacity.

name: list_datasets
description: List ZFS datasets and their mount points.

name: search_api_methods
description: Search for any of the 1,000+ niche API methods by keyword.

name: execute_custom_api_call
description: Execute any arbitrary TrueNAS API method discovered via search.

name: start_vm
description: Start a specific virtual machine by ID or Name.

name: stop_vm
description: Stop or power off a virtual machine.

name: control_service
description: Start, stop, or restart system services (ssh, smb, nfs).
